title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Unacademy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
